title: Ukraine’s drone playbook is wreaking havoc in Russia — and upending where NATO wants to invest
summary_full: Ukraine’s deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.
summary_public: Ukraine’s deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine’s drone playbook is wreaking havoc
